sentence: I haven't finished my homework yet.
translation: No he terminado mi tarea todavía.
Él no ha visto esa película.

sentence: I won't go to the party.

translation: Ella no le dirá a nadie.

sentence: He won't come to the meeting.
translation: Él no vendrá a la reunión.

sentence: We won't stop until we finish.
They won't agree with that plan.
translation: No estarán de acuerdo con ese plan.
Ella no ha terminado su proyecto.
Él no ha leído el libro.

sentence: I am not going to tell you.
translation: No te lo voy a decir.

sentence: She isn't going to study tonight.
translation: Ella no va a estudiar esta noche.

sentence: He isn't going to attend the meeting.
translation: Él no va a asistir a la reunión.

sentence: We aren't going to leave early.
They aren't going to come with us.
translation: No se van a unir a nosotros.
Él no ha estado en Londres.
Él no lo hará de nuevo.
Ella no ha empezado su tarea.
Él no ha entendido la lección.

sentence: We haven't bought a new car.
translation: No hemos comprado un coche nuevo.

sentence: They haven't spoken to him yet.
I am not going to do it.
She isn't going to call me.
translation: Ella no me va a llamar.

sentence: He isn't going to study today.
translation: Él no va a estudiar hoy.

sentence: We aren't going to travel next month.
translation: No vamos a viajar el próximo mes.

sentence: They aren't going to help us.
I haven't sent the email yet.
translation: Todavía no he enviado el correo.
Ella no ha devuelto mi llamada.
Él no ha limpiado su habitación.

sentence: They haven't paid the bill yet.
translation: Todavía no han pagado la cuenta.

sentence: I won't believe it until I see it.
They won't come to the event.
